output_schema.artifact_markdown: The channel-neutral argument: claim, reasoning, evidence mapped to claims, trade-offs, and implications
output_schema.resumo: 2-3 sentence summary of the approved argument, any gaps identified, or the blocker question
output_schema.self_check: Bullet list validating the argument against evidence mapping, trade-offs, claim defensibility, and Wolven voice
output_schema.blocker_question: One highest-impact question when an approved angle or evidence is missing; omitted when argument is complete
